title: Data register report
description: Data contract for the data-register format: a full-bleed enterprise data-grid application for catalogues built for lookup, filter, sort, and drill-down. Structure: a sticky app bar with result count, a sticky toolbar (search, status chips, column-toggle, sort), an optional left facet rail, and one dense sortable/filterable grid table whose rows open into key/value detail drawers. Prose is near-zero. Default theme: Slate. The sample's DATA array is a valid set of row instances of this schema.

meta.description: Shared report chrome (org / project / title / theme). Brand-neutral: use real or brand-neutral values (e.g. Independent Research / Open Research / Research Desk); never leave a {{...}} placeholder.

reportType.description: Register type label shown in the app bar, e.g. 'Third-party risk register', 'Requirements inventory',.

title.description: Register title displayed in the app bar, e.g. 'Vendor risk & control register'.

subtitle.description: Optional one-line context note shown in the app bar or toolbar.

date.description: ISO date the register was generated or last refreshed (YYYY-MM-DD).

theme.description: Initial brand theme; applied as <html data-theme>. Data-register default is 'slate'.

columns.description: Column definitions for the grid table header. Render order is left-to-right. The leading disclosure column is always injected automatically; do not include it here.

key.description: Stable unique field key that corresponds to the matching property in every row object.

label.description: Column header label shown in the <thead> (mono uppercase).

type.description: Data type used for sort and alignment. 'text' = string sort, left-align; 'num' = numeric sort, right-align (tnum mono); 'date' = ISO date sort, left-align; 'status' = rendered as st-badge (ok/risk/hold), string sort.

sortable.description: If true (default), this column is click-sortable with an asc/desc caret.

hidden.description: If true, column is hidden on initial load (user can show it via the column-toggle menu).

width.description: Optional CSS min-width hint for the column, e.g. '120px', '200px'. Renderer may ignore if the table needs to flex.

facets.description: Optional left facet rail groups. Each facet group provides checkbox filters that narrow the visible rows. The renderer derives option counts from the rows automatically; the options listed here supply the display labels and canonical values.

key.description: Row field key this facet filters on (must match a column key or a row field).

label.description: Facet group heading, e.g. 'Domain', 'Criticality tier', 'Control owner'.

options.description: Available facet option values (display label + canonical value).

value.description: Canonical value that must match the row field exactly for this facet to apply.

label.description: Optional display label shown in the facet list. Defaults to value if omitted.

rows.description: The register records. Each row object must contain a value for every column key defined in `columns`. It also carries `status` (for the status column and chip filter) and optionally a `detail` object that populates the drill-down drawer.

id.description: Stable unique row identifier displayed in the leading reference column (e.g. 'VR-001', 'REQ-042').

status.description: Semantic health / completion state of this record. Drives the st-badge colouring and the status-chip filter.

detail.description: Optional drill-down drawer content shown when the disclosure toggle opens the row. Contains a key/value grid plus reference chip links.

heading.description: Optional bold heading line inside the drawer (e.g. vendor + control name).

notes.description: Short prose notes rendered in the drawer (e.g. Finding, Required action). Each note has a lead label and body text.

kv.description: Key/value pairs rendered as a compact grid in the drawer, e.g. {k:'Service', v:'Primary IaaS hosting'}.

refs.description: Reference chip links rendered in the drawer footer (e.g. contract refs, audit refs, compliance certs). Each chip has a label and an optional icon category.

icon.description: Optional icon category key for the chip. Data-register-relevant categories: 'data' (catalogue, table), 'status' (shield, check), 'nav' (link, external), 'legal-governance' (document, audit, contract).

href.description: Optional URL; if present the chip renders as a link.

rows.ctrl: Northwind Cloud — Data residency & encryption attestation

detail.heading: Northwind Cloud — Data residency & encryption attestation

notes.text: Encryption-at-rest attestation lapsed at the sub-processor used for backup storage; the residency clause is not yet reflected in the renewed order form.
Obtain refreshed sub-processor attestation and execute the residency addendum before the prod failover test.

rows.ctrl: Helios Pay — PCI-DSS scope & tokenisation boundary

detail.heading: Helios Pay — PCI-DSS scope & tokenisation boundary

notes.text: Tokenisation boundary diagram is out of date after the gateway migration; CDE scope cannot be confirmed for the new settlement path.
Re-baseline the CDE data-flow and request an interim AOC covering the migrated settlement endpoint.
New ML sub-processor added without 30-day notice; DPA Schedule 3 not yet countersigned.
Countersign updated DPA schedule and confirm the sub-processor inherits equivalent controls.

notes.text: Quarterly access recertification completed; no orphaned admin entitlements detected.
